exampleSentencesTranslated: My room is very messy today because I haven't cleaned up.
If the desk is messy, I will have trouble finding what I need.
She feels uncomfortable when everything in the house is messy.
notes_md:
**lung tung** = messy, all over the place, not organized.

It’s an adjective. You use it to describe rooms, desks, hair, papers, thoughts—anything that feels scattered or chaotic. It can also describe actions or talking when someone jumps around with no order.

It often goes with things like *đồ đạc, giấy tờ, quần áo, tóc, suy nghĩ*.  

Strong memory link: **bừa bộn** (similar: messy) ↔ **gọn gàng** (opposite: neat, tidy).

exampleSentences: Phòng của em hôm nay rất lung tung vì chưa dọn dẹp.
Nếu bàn làm việc lung tung, anh sẽ khó tìm đồ cần thiết.
Chị cảm thấy khó chịu khi mọi thứ trong nhà bị lung tung.
